raw_91_honest_C3: raw 137 80% target on small-file class (median <600B) is NOT algorithmically reachable with A1+A4+A12+A16(b85)+A9+A19 chain on nexus state schemas. Underlying cause: schema diversity (38 distinct schemas across 94 files) means cross-file federation has insufficient amortization base. Each small file individually <2KB → fixed A1/A4/A12 metadata overhead exceeds compression on payload. Reach path: corpus-class-aware deployment (apply A19 only when median > 1KB AND total > 100KB) OR algorithmic redesign (A20 schema-aware BPE / A22 self-decoding). Current claim 'small-file class breakthrough via A19' MEASURED-FALSE on this corpus.
